description:
Notes in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Netanel regarding a sugya in Bava Metzia. Very possibly written during his stay in Lucena, Spain, 1138/39 CE, while he was studying under Yosef Ibn Migash. (Information from India Book IV, Hebrew description below).

Probably Spain; 1138-1139
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
